{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Kerian's Intent
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Kerian's Intent]] is characterized by absolute focus.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
